{"rule":"WHITESPACE_RULE","sentence":"^\\Q\\E(?:Dummy|Ina|Jimmy-|Dummy-|Maniquí-|Maniquíes-|Dummy\\+|Dummy's\\+)[0-9]+\\Q \\E(?:Dummy|Ina|Jimmy-|Dummy-|Maniquí-|Maniquíes-|Dummy\\+|Dummy's\\+)[0-9]+\\Q TCP port to listen on\n\\E(?:Dummy|Ina|Jimmy-|Dummy-|Maniquí-|Maniquíes-|Dummy\\+|Dummy's\\+)[0-9]+\\Q (search PATH) Path to the \\E(?:Dummy|Ina|Jimmy-|Dummy-|Maniquí-|Maniquíes-|Dummy\\+|Dummy's\\+)[0-9]+\\Q binary\n\\E(?:Dummy|Ina|Jimmy-|Dummy-|Maniquí-|Maniquíes-|Dummy\\+|Dummy's\\+)[0-9]+\\Q \\E(?:Dummy|Ina|Jimmy-|Dummy-|Maniquí-|Maniquíes-|Dummy\\+|Dummy's\\+)[0-9]+\\Q amdgpu_top refresh period in milliseconds\n\\E(?:Dummy|Ina|Jimmy-|Dummy-|Maniquí-|Maniquíes-|Dummy\\+|Dummy's\\+)[0-9]+\\Q \\E(?:Dummy|Ina|Jimmy-|Dummy-|Maniquí-|Maniquíes-|Dummy\\+|Dummy's\\+)[0-9]+\\Q amdgpu_top fdinfo update interval in seconds\n\\E(?:Dummy|Ina|Jimmy-|Dummy-|Maniquí-|Maniquíes-|Dummy\\+|Dummy's\\+)[0-9]+\\Q (all) Select a single GPU by instance index\n\\E(?:Dummy|Ina|Jimmy-|Dummy-|Maniquí-|Maniquíes-|Dummy\\+|Dummy's\\+)[0-9]+\\Q   Select GPU by PCI address (\\E(?:Dummy|Ina|Jimmy-|Dummy-|Maniquí-|Maniquíes-|Dummy\\+|Dummy's\\+)[0-9]+\\Q)\n\\E(?:Dummy|Ina|Jimmy-|Dummy-|Maniquí-|Maniquíes-|Dummy\\+|Dummy's\\+)[0-9]+\\Q \\E(?:Dummy|Ina|Jimmy-|Dummy-|Maniquí-|Maniquíes-|Dummy\\+|Dummy's\\+)[0-9]+\\Q Select APU instance\n\\E(?:Dummy|Ina|Jimmy-|Dummy-|Maniquí-|Maniquíes-|Dummy\\+|Dummy's\\+)[0-9]+\\Q \\E(?:Dummy|Ina|Jimmy-|Dummy-|Maniquí-|Maniquíes-|Dummy\\+|Dummy's\\+)[0-9]+\\Q Display only the selected GPU\n\\E(?:Dummy|Ina|Jimmy-|Dummy-|Maniquí-|Maniquíes-|Dummy\\+|Dummy's\\+)[0-9]+\\Q \\E(?:Dummy|Ina|Jimmy-|Dummy-|Maniquí-|Maniquíes-|Dummy\\+|Dummy's\\+)[0-9]+\\Q Skip GPU performance counter reads\\E$"}
{"rule":"NUMBERS_IN_WORDS","sentence":"^\\QAfter cloning, run the gomod2nix workflow manually (Settings → Actions → Update gomod2nix.toml → Run workflow), or run locally:\\E$"}
{"rule":"COMMA_COMPOUND_SENTENCE_2","sentence":"^\\QThe NixOS module pins \\E(?:Dummy|Ina|Jimmy-|Dummy-|Maniquí-|Maniquíes-|Dummy\\+|Dummy's\\+)[0-9]+\\Q to \\E(?:Dummy|Ina|Jimmy-|Dummy-|Maniquí-|Maniquíes-|Dummy\\+|Dummy's\\+)[0-9]+\\Q from the same nixpkgs revision, passing its store path via \\E(?:Dummy|Ina|Jimmy-|Dummy-|Maniquí-|Maniquíes-|Dummy\\+|Dummy's\\+)[0-9]+\\Q so the service never relies on \\E(?:Dummy|Ina|Jimmy-|Dummy-|Maniquí-|Maniquíes-|Dummy\\+|Dummy's\\+)[0-9]+\\Q.\\E$"}
{"rule":"UPPERCASE_SENTENCE_START","sentence":"^\\Qatopweb\\E$"}
{"rule":"WHITESPACE_RULE","sentence":"^\\Q\\E(?:Dummy|Ina|Jimmy-|Dummy-|Maniquí-|Maniquíes-|Dummy\\+|Dummy's\\+)[0-9]+\\Q \\E(?:Dummy|Ina|Jimmy-|Dummy-|Maniquí-|Maniquíes-|Dummy\\+|Dummy's\\+)[0-9]+\\Q TCP port to listen on\n\\E(?:Dummy|Ina|Jimmy-|Dummy-|Maniquí-|Maniquíes-|Dummy\\+|Dummy's\\+)[0-9]+\\Q (search PATH) Path to the \\E(?:Dummy|Ina|Jimmy-|Dummy-|Maniquí-|Maniquíes-|Dummy\\+|Dummy's\\+)[0-9]+\\Q binary\n\\E(?:Dummy|Ina|Jimmy-|Dummy-|Maniquí-|Maniquíes-|Dummy\\+|Dummy's\\+)[0-9]+\\Q \\E(?:Dummy|Ina|Jimmy-|Dummy-|Maniquí-|Maniquíes-|Dummy\\+|Dummy's\\+)[0-9]+\\Q Launch \\E(?:Dummy|Ina|Jimmy-|Dummy-|Maniquí-|Maniquíes-|Dummy\\+|Dummy's\\+)[0-9]+\\Q (and \\E(?:Dummy|Ina|Jimmy-|Dummy-|Maniquí-|Maniquíes-|Dummy\\+|Dummy's\\+)[0-9]+\\Q) via \\E(?:Dummy|Ina|Jimmy-|Dummy-|Maniquí-|Maniquíes-|Dummy\\+|Dummy's\\+)[0-9]+\\Q instead of running atopweb as root\n\\E(?:Dummy|Ina|Jimmy-|Dummy-|Maniquí-|Maniquíes-|Dummy\\+|Dummy's\\+)[0-9]+\\Q \\E(?:Dummy|Ina|Jimmy-|Dummy-|Maniquí-|Maniquíes-|Dummy\\+|Dummy's\\+)[0-9]+\\Q Path to the sudo binary (NixOS: \\E(?:Dummy|Ina|Jimmy-|Dummy-|Maniquí-|Maniquíes-|Dummy\\+|Dummy's\\+)[0-9]+\\Q)\n\\E(?:Dummy|Ina|Jimmy-|Dummy-|Maniquí-|Maniquíes-|Dummy\\+|Dummy's\\+)[0-9]+\\Q   Path to \\E(?:Dummy|Ina|Jimmy-|Dummy-|Maniquí-|Maniquíes-|Dummy\\+|Dummy's\\+)[0-9]+\\Q; {"rule":"LEARN_NNNNS_ON_DO","sentence":"^\\QKnown-process poll — a learning cache of process names that have previously used the GPU (persisted to disk with \\E(?:Dummy|Ina|Jimmy-|Dummy-|Maniquí-|Maniquíes-|Dummy\\+|Dummy's\\+)[0-9]+\\Q); matches new PIDs in \\E(?:Dummy|Ina|Jimmy-|Dummy-|Maniquí-|Maniquíes-|Dummy\\+|Dummy's\\+)[0-9]+\\Q before they touch the GPU.\\E$"}
{"rule":"WHITESPACE_RULE","sentence":"^\\Q\\E(?:Dummy|Ina|Jimmy-|Dummy-|Maniquí-|Maniquíes-|Dummy\\+|Dummy's\\+)[0-9]+\\Q \\E(?:Dummy|Ina|Jimmy-|Dummy-|Maniquí-|Maniquíes-|Dummy\\+|Dummy's\\+)[0-9]+\\Q TCP port to listen on\n\\E(?:Dummy|Ina|Jimmy-|Dummy-|Maniquí-|Maniquíes-|Dummy\\+|Dummy's\\+)[0-9]+\\Q (search PATH) Path to the \\E(?:Dummy|Ina|Jimmy-|Dummy-|Maniquí-|Maniquíes-|Dummy\\+|Dummy's\\+)[0-9]+\\Q binary\n\\E(?:Dummy|Ina|Jimmy-|Dummy-|Maniquí-|Maniquíes-|Dummy\\+|Dummy's\\+)[0-9]+\\Q \\E(?:Dummy|Ina|Jimmy-|Dummy-|Maniquí-|Maniquíes-|Dummy\\+|Dummy's\\+)[0-9]+\\Q Launch \\E(?:Dummy|Ina|Jimmy-|Dummy-|Maniquí-|Maniquíes-|Dummy\\+|Dummy's\\+)[0-9]+\\Q (and \\E(?:Dummy|Ina|Jimmy-|Dummy-|Maniquí-|Maniquíes-|Dummy\\+|Dummy's\\+)[0-9]+\\Q) via \\E(?:Dummy|Ina|Jimmy-|Dummy-|Maniquí-|Maniquíes-|Dummy\\+|Dummy's\\+)[0-9]+\\Q instead of running atopweb as root\n\\E(?:Dummy|Ina|Jimmy-|Dummy-|Maniquí-|Maniquíes-|Dummy\\+|Dummy's\\+)[0-9]+\\Q \\E(?:Dummy|Ina|Jimmy-|Dummy-|Maniquí-|Maniquíes-|Dummy\\+|Dummy's\\+)[0-9]+\\Q Path to the sudo binary (NixOS: \\E(?:Dummy|Ina|Jimmy-|Dummy-|Maniquí-|Maniquíes-|Dummy\\+|Dummy's\\+)[0-9]+\\Q)\n\\E(?:Dummy|Ina|Jimmy-|Dummy-|Maniquí-|Maniquíes-|Dummy\\+|Dummy's\\+)[0-9]+\\Q   Path to \\E(?:Dummy|Ina|Jimmy-|Dummy-|Maniquí-|Maniquíes-|Dummy\\+|Dummy's\\+)[0-9]+\\Q; {"rule":"EN_A_VS_AN","sentence":"^\\QAdds a udev rule granting the \\E(?:Dummy|Ina|Jimmy-|Dummy-|Maniquí-|Maniquíes-|Dummy\\+|Dummy's\\+)[0-9]+\\Q group read access on \\E(?:Dummy|Ina|Jimmy-|Dummy-|Maniquí-|Maniquíes-|Dummy\\+|Dummy's\\+)[0-9]+\\Q (default kernel mode is \\E(?:Dummy|Ina|Jimmy-|Dummy-|Maniquí-|Maniquíes-|Dummy\\+|Dummy's\\+)[0-9]+\\Q; the msr driver's own \\E(?:Dummy|Ina|Jimmy-|Dummy-|Maniquí-|Maniquíes-|Dummy\\+|Dummy's\\+)[0-9]+\\Q check still applies on top).\\E$"}
{"rule":"WHITESPACE_RULE","sentence":"^\\Q\\E(?:Dummy|Ina|Jimmy-|Dummy-|Maniquí-|Maniquíes-|Dummy\\+|Dummy's\\+)[0-9]+\\Q \\E(?:Dummy|Ina|Jimmy-|Dummy-|Maniquí-|Maniquíes-|Dummy\\+|Dummy's\\+)[0-9]+\\Q TCP port to listen on\n\\E(?:Dummy|Ina|Jimmy-|Dummy-|Maniquí-|Maniquíes-|Dummy\\+|Dummy's\\+)[0-9]+\\Q (search PATH) Path to the \\E(?:Dummy|Ina|Jimmy-|Dummy-|Maniquí-|Maniquíes-|Dummy\\+|Dummy's\\+)[0-9]+\\Q binary\n\\E(?:Dummy|Ina|Jimmy-|Dummy-|Maniquí-|Maniquíes-|Dummy\\+|Dummy's\\+)[0-9]+\\Q \\E(?:Dummy|Ina|Jimmy-|Dummy-|Maniquí-|Maniquíes-|Dummy\\+|Dummy's\\+)[0-9]+\\Q Launch \\E(?:Dummy|Ina|Jimmy-|Dummy-|Maniquí-|Maniquíes-|Dummy\\+|Dummy's\\+)[0-9]+\\Q (and \\E(?:Dummy|Ina|Jimmy-|Dummy-|Maniquí-|Maniquíes-|Dummy\\+|Dummy's\\+)[0-9]+\\Q) via \\E(?:Dummy|Ina|Jimmy-|Dummy-|Maniquí-|Maniquíes-|Dummy\\+|Dummy's\\+)[0-9]+\\Q (for non-root deployments that use a NOPASSWD sudoers entry instead of running atopweb as root)\n\\E(?:Dummy|Ina|Jimmy-|Dummy-|Maniquí-|Maniquíes-|Dummy\\+|Dummy's\\+)[0-9]+\\Q \\E(?:Dummy|Ina|Jimmy-|Dummy-|Maniquí-|Maniquíes-|Dummy\\+|Dummy's\\+)[0-9]+\\Q Path to the sudo binary (NixOS: \\E(?:Dummy|Ina|Jimmy-|Dummy-|Maniquí-|Maniquíes-|Dummy\\+|Dummy's\\+)[0-9]+\\Q)\n\\E(?:Dummy|Ina|Jimmy-|Dummy-|Maniquí-|Maniquíes-|Dummy\\+|Dummy's\\+)[0-9]+\\Q   Path to \\E(?:Dummy|Ina|Jimmy-|Dummy-|Maniquí-|Maniquíes-|Dummy\\+|Dummy's\\+)[0-9]+\\Q; {"rule":"UPPERCASE_SENTENCE_START","sentence":"^\\Qatopweb Agent Guide\\E$"}
{"rule":"IN_WINDOWS","sentence":"^\\QAfter container creation completes, Go analysis runs in Linux with CGO enabled and the linux-tagged files in \\E(?:Dummy|Ina|Jimmy-|Dummy-|Maniquí-|Maniquíes-|Dummy\\+|Dummy's\\+)[0-9]+\\Q should stop showing the \"No packages found for open file\" warning.\\E$"}
